li.label: listened to terrible music
li.description: That disc was genuinely unpleasant. I wish I hadn't bothered.

li.label: listened to some music
li.description: Not much to say about that disc. It passed the time.

li.label: listened to decent music
li.description: That was a pleasant listen. Nothing extraordinary, but enjoyable.

li.label: listened to good music
li.description: A solid album. I found myself humming along.

li.label: listened to excellent music
li.description: That album was genuinely moving. The compositions were inspired.

li.label: listened to masterwork music
li.description: A masterpiece. Every track was crafted with extraordinary skill and feeling.

li.label: listened to legendary music
li.description: I don't have words. That album moved something deep inside me. I may never hear its like again.
